nasb.text: But he said, “It is not the sound of the cry of triumph, Nor is it the sound of the cry of defeat; But the sound of singing I hear.”

esv.text: But he said, “It is not the sound of shouting for victory, or the sound of the cry of defeat, but the sound of singing that I hear.”

cnv.text: 摩西回答： “這不是戰勝的呼聲， 也不是戰敗的呼聲； 我聽見的是歌唱的聲音。”

ccb.text: 摩西对他说：“这不是打胜仗的声音，也不是打败仗的声音，而是狂欢的声音。”
